lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Don't worry, I'm not going to cause trouble.

lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: But you shouldn't be here - be off with you!

lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: Mighty? You look like another of those silly adventurers who thinks they're the bee's knees just because they've done a few lousy quests!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well it sounds better than sitting on this rooftop all day looking at trees!

lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: I'll have you know it's a very important job guarding this jail!

lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: If anyone comes sneaking in here to mess around with the prisoners, the lads downstairs will make mincemeat of them, and I'll be here to pick them off if they try to escape.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You mean people aren't meant to be able to shoot the prisoners in the cells?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, it's been nice talking to you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, you're just imagining it. Perhaps you've been up here in the sun for too long?

lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: So who am I talking to?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh dear, you've started talking to yourself. That's a common sign that you're going mad!

lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: But... but... you're standing right there...
